---
title: "My Dashbord at IAS"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

<!-- links -->
```{r}
map1link= "map1.rds"
viz1=map1link

map2link= "map2.rds"
viz2=map2link

map3link= "map3.rds"
viz3=map3link
```

## Intro {.sidebar}
This dashboard presents three spatial visualizations created from the Spain geopackage.

Population DDM
Population PSM
Population density Choropleth


## Column {data-width="450"}

### Population DDM
```{r}

readRDS(viz1)
```

### Population PSM

```{r}

readRDS(viz2)
```

## Column {data-width="550"}

### Population density Choropleth

```{r}
readRDS(viz3)
```
